title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 253.195 - Fireworks prohibited, exception
text:
253.195.  Fireworks prohibited, exception. — Fireworks, as defined in section 320.106, of any type are prohibited within the boundaries of any state park except upon the written permission granted by the department of natural resources.
(L. 1971 H.B. 300 § 3, A.L. 2025 S.B. 81 & 174)
